name: Italian Brochettes with Angel Hair Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Vegetable broth or olive oil
recipeInstructions:
Cut eggplant, squash, and zucchini into pieces that are 1/4 inch thick. Halve the mushrooms.
and cut the bell peppers into strips. Quarter the red and yellow bell peppers,
removing the skins only if they are dirty. Trim the outer leaves of fennel
and remove any dirt. Slice into 8 thin wedges. Place all vegetables in a large bowl.
MARINADE: Remove thyme leaves from their stems, keeping the stems. In a food processor,
process the thyme, red pepper, zest, salt, and pepper. Add garlic while the machine is running.
Turn off the machine, then add lemon juice. Turn on the machine again and add vegetable broth
or olive oil in a slow stream. Process for 1 minute. Pour over the vegetables and allow to marinate
for 15 minutes.
Prepare the grill and cover it to build intense heat. Skewer the vegetables.
Toss some thyme stems onto the heat shield or coals. Place the brochettes on the hot grill,
cover, and smoke for 5 minutes. Remove the cover, turn, and cook for another 3 to 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, drain the marinade into a small non-reactive pot. Add tomato sauce
and heat through. When the skewers are almost done, cook the pasta.
Drain and return it to the pot. Pour the sauce over the pasta and toss to coat.
Serve with grilled vegetables.
VARIATION: Use sourdough bread brushed with the marinade and lightly grilled instead of the pasta.
PER SERVING: 314 Calories; 14g Protein; 3g Fat; 58g Carbohydrates; 0 Cholesterol; 240mg Sodium;
8g Fiber.
